creator: homaei@corebox.ir
text:
The Makefile is pointing to this URL:
http://dist.codelabs.ru/fbsd/ports/slim-themes/
which is not SSL ready

Also freshports.org URL is abandoned:
http://slim.berlios.de/themes01.php

Therefore, I'm hosting files on dedicated and SSL-ready server at this URL:
https://contents.meetbsd.ir/apps/opensource/slim/

and the patch would be committed,
Thanks
